Describe what this PR changes and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix

Link issue or task (if applicable).

## Validation

- [ ] Backend tests pass (`python -m pytest` in backend)
- [ ] Frontend build passes (`npm run build` in frontend)
- [ ] Docker compose services start locally (`docker compose up -d`)
- [ ] CI checks pass in GitHub Actions

## Deployment Notes

Describe any environment variables, secrets, or rollout steps required.

## Checklist

- [ ] I updated documentation when needed
- [ ] I added or updated tests where appropriate
- [ ] I verified no sensitive data was committed
